channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: The Latest: Trump suggests permanently resettling Palestinians from Gaza in meeting with Netanyahu
item.description: During a meeting with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, President Donald Trump suggested that displaced Palestinians in Gaza should be “permanently” resettled outside the war-torn territory.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump administration will consider redrawing boundaries of national monuments as part of energy push
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As part of the Trump administration’s push to expand U.S. energy production, federal officials will review and consider redrawing the boundaries of national monuments created under previous presidents to protect unique landscapes and cultural resources.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN and MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In Trump's quest to close the Education Department, Congress and his own agenda may get in the way
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump is preparing to gut the U.S. Education Department to the full extent of his power, directing his administration to slash spending while pressuring employees to quit.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY and BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Still locked out of federal funding, several Head Start preschools may need to close temporarily
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Head Start preschools serving thousands of children around the country could be at risk of closing because they remain locked out of their federal funding, a problem that first surfaced last week during President Donald Trump's aborted effort to freeze federal grants.
item.dc:creator: MORIAH BALINGIT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Remains of all 67 victims of the midair collision near DC recovered as NTSB probes altitude data
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — The remains of all 67 victims of last week's midair collision of an American Airlines flight and an Army helicopter near the nation's capital have been recovered, authorities said Tuesday. All but one has been identified.
item.dc:creator: SERKAN GURBUZ and MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump picks former chief entangled in 'Sharpiegate' to lead NOAA
item.description: President Donald Trump has nominated Neil Jacobs to lead the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Remains of all 67 victims in deadly DC plane and chopper collision now recovered
item.description: The chief medical examiner is still trying to positively identify one set of remains, officials said in a news release.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Agents sue FBI, DOJ amid fears of retaliation over work on Jan. 6 cases
item.description: The FBI and the Department of Justice (DOJ) are being sued by 16 current agents who say their review of those who worked on the cases of some 1,500 Jan. 6 defendants is a preparation to retaliate against agents.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Church vandalized by Proud Boys now controls group's trademark, judge rules
item.description: The Proud Boys is barred from selling merchandise using its name or symbols without permission from a Black church once vandalized by the right-wing extremist group's members, after a Washington, D.C., judge on Monday revoked its control over the trademark.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WGN 9

item.title: Trump oil tariffs expected to raise price at the pump
item.description: President Trump’s tariff on Canadian oil is expected to raise prices at the pump for U.S. consumers, if it takes effect as planned after a 30-day delay.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: El Salvador offers to accept deportees from US of any nationality, including Americans: Rubio
item.description: The U.S. government cannot deport American citizens and such a move would be met with significant legal challenges.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US military flying surveillance aircraft for reconnaissance missions along southern border with Mexico
item.description: The U.S. military is conducting ISR missions via aircraft along the southern border under President Donald Trump's executive order addressing border security and immigration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China hits US with retaliatory tariffs
item.description: China hit the U.S. back with retaliatory tariffs across the board over President Trump’s enforcement of tariffs on Chinese goods that went into effect on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Struggling with your mental health after surviving a disaster? Here's how to look after yourself
item.description: There’s the initial shock and chaos in a collective disaster like the deadly and destructive California wildfires.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump administration opens antisemitism inquiries at 5 colleges including Columbia and Berkeley
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration is opening new investigations into allegations of antisemitism at five U.S. universities including Columbia and the University of California, Berkeley, the Education Department announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Gerber recalls all batches of Soothe N Chew Teething Sticks nationwide
item.description: Gerber Products Company has announced a nationwide recall and discontinuation of all batches of its Soothe N Chew Teething Sticks due to a potential choking hazard for infants and young children.
item.dc:creator: Reagan Wynn, ABC 4

item.title: Some US businesses close in a 'day without immigrants.' But many say they can't lose income
item.description: Several businesses from day cares to grocery stores and hair salons closed Monday across the U.S. in a loosely organized day of protest against President Donald Trump's immigration policies.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO and MELISSA PEREZ WINDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: LA wildfires: Famed Pacific Coast Highway reopens nearly 1 month after disaster
item.description: The Pacific Coast Highway in Malibu, California, partially reopened on Monday, for the first time since fires tore through neighborhoods, destroying homes and businesses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Salvage crews recover engine, large portion of jet from river after deadly air collision near DC
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Salvage crews have recovered an engine and large pieces of fuselage and are working to retrieve a wing from the wreckage of a commercial airliner involved in last week's midair collision near Washington’s Reagan National Airport, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: DAVID R. MARTIN, MICHAEL R. SISAK and CLAUDIA LAUER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Transportation secretary says 'expansive' impact zone was left by Philadelphia medical plane crash
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The impact area where a medical transportation plane crashed in Philadelphia was notably “expansive,” U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said Monday after viewing the site with investigators and city officials. Duffy said he was struck by “how expansive it was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Musk adds Shell, Nestlé, Lego to X advertiser 'boycott' lawsuit
item.description: X is adding several more companies to its lawsuit accusing firms of conspiring on an advertising "boycott" on the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KRON4

item.title: Starbucks introduces Valentine's Day drinks, new refreshers
item.description: Instead of stuffed teddy bears or roses, Starbucks is gifting its customers new menu offerings this Valentine’s Day. On Monday, the coffee chain announced that it will be adding Blackberry Sage Refreshers to menus for a limited time.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: What is known about the deadly collision between a passenger jet and Army helicopter
item.description: American Airlines Flight 5342 and an Army helicopter collided in midair near Washington D.C.'s Reagan National Wednesday night, sending the two aircraft into the Potomac River and killing all 67 aboard in the deadliest U.S. air disaster since 2001.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Salvage crews remove large portion of commercial jet from river after deadly air collision near DC
item.description: Salvage crews have removed a large portion of a commercial jet from the Potomac River near Washington’s Reagan National Airport on Monday, five days after a midair collision last week that killed 67 people.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: New York shields abortion pill prescribers after a doctor was indicted in Louisiana
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York Gov. Kathy Hochul on Monday signed a bill to shield the identities of doctors who prescribe abortion medications, days after a physician in the state was charged with prescribing abortion pills to a pregnant minor in Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump signs order to create US sovereign wealth fund, eyeing TikTok purchase
item.description: President Trump on Monday directed secretaries to begin a process to create an American sovereign wealth fund, suggesting it could partially own the popular app TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, ABC 4

item.title: Who gets more disaster aid? Republican states. Here's the breakdown
item.description: Experts say every state gets millions in federal help — and a little more goes to Republican states and congressional districts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump, Mexican president agree to delay tariffs for one month
item.description: President Trump and Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum said they have agreed to delay tariffs by at least one month, following a call between the two leaders Monday. The 25 percent tariffs on Mexico were to be implemented Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Stocks sink as Trump tariffs rattle Wall Street
item.description: The stock market opened with steep losses Monday in the wake of President Donald Trump's aggressive new tariffs on Canadian, Mexican and Chinese goods.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, WGN 9

item.title: Father of 8 shot, killed while making DoorDash deliveries
item.description: "He was my best friend," said wife Rudie Rouse, who married Shawn Rouse of Fayetteville in 2022. "I'm just numb.
item.dc:creator: Rodney Overton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US Capitol Police recruit killed in Georgia car crash, other injured recruits airlifted to hospital
item.description: Democratic congressional leadership said U.S. Capitol Police Recruit Officer Christopher Katz died in a fatal car crash in Georgia that injured other recruits.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Army identifies 3rd soldier killed in DC crash
item.description: The U.S. Army on Saturday identified the third soldier who died last week during a training mission that ended in a midair crash between an Army Black Hawk helicopter and an American Airlines regional jet near Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: Man hit in head by debris from Philadelphia plane crash that broke through diner window
item.description: A Philadelphia diner patron was injured Friday when a piece of debris from a medevac jet that crashed hurtled through a window and hit the man in the head.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Journaling is hard, but this smart new app makes it easier
item.description: Keeping a journal isn't easy, but the benefits are clear. "The need we have to try to make sense or our experience is deep," said David Coates, a psychotherapist and coach.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: DeWanna Bonner will join the Indiana Fever, AP source says
item.description: DeWanna Bonner is headed to Indiana to join Caitlin Clark and the Fever, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5
